description: Extending far down from the top or surface; profound in quality or feeling. 'Nulo' names the quality of depth—physical extension downward and metaphorical profundity of meaning.
sound_symbolism: The word descends. 'Nu' begins low, depth initiated. Then 'lo' continues downward, profundity reached.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'nulo mira' (deep water), 'nulo nori' (deep knowledge). Works both physically and metaphorically.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Deep practice penetrates surface—insight comes from going beneath habitual patterns.
pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Deep appreciation sees beyond surface beauty—understanding the organic principles that generate form.
